title: 3D Potion
description: Collection of 3D models of vials and potions
body:
# Make sure to install Hold My Items and Pommel - Held Item Models
This pack turns flat textures of potions and bottles into detailed 3D objects inspired by Minecraft Dungeons. The style is fresh but true to the spirit of vanilla Minecraft.

Works without mods and OptiFine, in a clean game.

List of items in 3D:

-All potions (regular, explosive, residual)

-Bottles (glass, honey, ominous)

-Dragon Breath

-Experience bottles

the most important feature is that potions are displayed in the inventory in 2D style and in the hands in 3D style.
